meta.leakage_check: COMPLIANT — all sources pre 2026-05-23 10:00 CT DAM cutoff
meta.spread_sign_convention: spread = DA - RT; positive => DA expensive => Short DA signal
meta.notes: Sunday flow date. DAM liquidity structurally reduced. Smartbidder DA/RT5 price series for 2026-05-24 not available; P(DA>RT) sourced from Smartbidder composite cited in market-analyst briefing.

positions.rationale: P(DA<RT)=62%; solar 17,991 MW; net load 29,070 MW; WEST_TO_NORTH congestion HIGH (35-50%); HubN is import-receiving node (positive lambda under constraint)
positions.risk_note: WEST_TO_NORTH may not bind or releases early if wind underforecast; max loss $77

positions.rationale: Net load near trough 27,752 MW; solar 21,416 MW; GR_WEST 600 MW (trough); congestion peak hour; strongest West export binding signal
positions.risk_note: Same congestion risk as HE10; additional sensitivity: if solar 2,807 MW below Enverus, net load slightly higher but direction unchanged

positions.rationale: Yes Energy net load trough (27,615 MW); P(DA<RT)=63% highest of solar block; solar 23,733 MW; wind GR_WEST 602 MW near zero; maximum solar depression hour
positions.risk_note: Highest P of solar block but also tightest net load floor; any wind surprise 600->1500 MW reduces binding probability

positions.rationale: P(DA>RT)=68.4%; spread +$2.54; Houston import constraint beginning; net load 40,794 MW; solar falling fast from 15,649 MW; congestion-analyst GKS MCC positive/neutral; Sunday DAM structural overprice
positions.risk_note: RT spike risk if early ramp surge; load still at 63,439 MW; resource cap out 15,100 MW limits headroom

positions.rationale: P(DA>RT)=68.4%; spread +$5.58; net load ramp +7,887 MW HE19-20 (largest single-hour step); solar collapse 6,468 MW; Houston import HIGH (P 35-45%); primary P&L hour
positions.risk_note: Highest net load ramp hour; ORDC scarcity most likely here; RT spike asymmetric loss risk; max acceptable loss ~$88 at base scenario

positions.rationale: P(DA>RT)=67.5%; spread +$16.51 largest of day; net load 53,905-54,446 MW; DA $65.76 reflects worst-case scarcity insurance; ECRS $8.27 + Non-Spin $16.23 confirm DAM scarcity pricing that RT typically does not fully realize; Sunday structural edge
positions.risk_note: HIGHEST VARIANCE POSITION. If ORDC triggers (resource cap out 15,100 MW + unplanned outage), RT can exceed $65.76 significantly. Max monitored loss at RT=$150: -$4,212. Actively monitor 5-min RT prices HE18-19.

positions.rationale: P(DA>RT)=66.7%; spread +$4.00; ramp unwinding; wind recovering 4,475 MW GR_WEST; net load 51,943 MW declining; congestion easing but still elevated; P signal sustained
positions.risk_note: Ramp tail risk moderating; wind recovery favorable (reduces RT spike probability); execution risk: Sunday DAM thin volume may cause partial fill at HE22

skipped_hours.HE01-09: P(DA<RT) 38-62% but no Smartbidder explicit overnight confirmation; overnight spread historically thin; no settlement history to validate; HE07-09 sunrise transition congestion risk
skipped_hours.HE13: Recovery hour; spread compressing; congestion easing; P falling
skipped_hours.HE14-15: P(DA<RT) 55-58% below 60% MED threshold for congestion-overlay hours
skipped_hours.HE16-17: P(DA>RT) 58-61%; HE16 below threshold; HE17 transition congestion risk; solar still 24-25 GW
skipped_hours.HE18: RT spike risk on ERCOT gross load peak 64,502 MW; asymmetric loss at ramp onset; yield to cleaner HE19 entry
skipped_hours.HE23-24: Direction reversal (DA<RT expected); wind ramping; spread thin -$1.0

risk_summary.primary_tail_risk: HE21 RT spike under ORDC scarcity conditions
congestion_risks: WEST_TO_NORTH binding timing error (HE10-12): may miss or arrive late
Houston import constraint magnitude uncertain (Stage 0, no PTDF)
data_gaps: Smartbidder DA/RT5 price file for 2026-05-24 not available
Hub-pair LMP data absent (HB_WEST, HB_NORTH, HB_HOUSTON separate series)
No settlement history for hit rate validation
risk_summary.model_limitations: v0 model; no quantile regressor; P(DA>RT) from Smartbidder composite only; no conditional E[spread|direction] estimator
